summary: Performance Tracker optional plan and leads navigation features tested successfully. All 11 backend tests passed. All UI features verified: 1) Target Plan is optional with 'No Plan' option, 2) Generate works without plan (target=₹0), 3) Two-row filter layout (Row1: Territory/City/Resource/Plan, Row2: Month/Year/Generate), 4) Leads Targeting Next Month click navigates to /leads with target_closure_month, target_closure_year, and assigned_to params, 5) LeadsList shows amber banner when target_closure filter active with Clear button.

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 11 tests passed (all-sales-resources, generate without plan, generate with plan, leads target_closure params, leads comma-separated assigned_to, combined filters)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI features verified (two-row filter layout, No Plan option, target=₹0 without plan, Leads Targeting navigation, amber banner with Clear button)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance Tracker optional plan feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) GET /api/performance/all-sales-resources returns resources with territory/city info independent of plan, 2) GET /api/performance/generate works with plan_id as optional query param (target=0 when no plan), 3) GET /api/leads accepts target_closure_month and target_closure_year query params, 4) assigned_to supports comma-separated values. Login returns session_token not token.

Test_1_All_Sales_Resources_Endpoint.description: GET /api/performance/all-sales-resources returns list of resources with resource_id, resource_name, territory_id, city
Test_1_All_Sales_Resources_Endpoint.evidence: API returns 200 with list of resources containing required fields

Test_2_Generate_Without_Plan.evidence: API returns 200 with revenue.target=0 when no plan_id provided

Test_3_Generate_With_Plan.evidence: API returns 200 with target from plan allocation

Test_4_Leads_Target_Closure_Params.description: GET /api/leads accepts target_closure_month and target_closure_year query params
Test_4_Leads_Target_Closure_Params.evidence: API returns 200 with paginated response when target_closure params provided

Test_5_Leads_Comma_Separated_Assigned_To.evidence: API returns 200 when assigned_to contains multiple user IDs

Test_6_Two_Row_Filter_Layout.description: Performance Tracker filter layout shows two rows
Test_6_Two_Row_Filter_Layout.evidence: Screenshot shows Row1 (Territory, City, Resource, Target Plan) and Row2 (Month, Year, Generate)

Test_7_Target_Plan_Optional.description: Target Plan dropdown shows 'No Plan' option
Test_7_Target_Plan_Optional.evidence: Screenshot shows 'No Plan' option in Target Plan dropdown

Test_8_Target_Zero_Without_Plan.description: Target shows ₹0 when no plan selected
Test_8_Target_Zero_Without_Plan.evidence: Screenshot shows TARGET: ₹0 in summary cards

Test_9_Leads_Targeting_Navigation.description: Clicking 'Leads Targeting Next Month' navigates to /leads with correct params

Test_10_Amber_Banner_With_Clear.description: LeadsList shows amber banner when target_closure filter active
Test_10_Amber_Banner_With_Clear.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Filtered by Target Closure: May 2026' banner with Clear button

Test_11_Clear_Button_Works.description: Clear button removes target_closure params and banner
Test_11_Clear_Button_Works.evidence: After clicking Clear, URL no longer contains target_closure params and banner is removed

all_sales_resources.response: List of {resource_id, resource_name, territory_id, territory_name, city}
